metadata.siteDescription: A personalized career development path: AI coach, development roadmap, tests, and labor market analytics.

free.name: Basic
features: Up to 10 coach messages per day

vacancies.title: Job Search
vacancies.liveMode: Live vacancies from the official hh.ru API. Filter by city, salary, format, and experience.
vacancies.demoMode: Demo database (select a profession for live hh.ru vacancies). Filter by profession, city, salary, and experience.
vacancies.personalized: Showing vacancies for your track. Change filters to browse others.
vacancies.empty: No vacancies match your filters. Try relaxing the criteria.

footer.tagline: A transparent, personalized professional development path. AI coach, development roadmap, tests, and labor market analytics in one place.
footer.disclaimer: HSE University student project «IT Consulting». Demo version: payments, market data, and some integrations are mocked.
footer.madeWithCare: Made with care for your career

landing.heroDescription: Jobish handles analysis and structuring of profession data. You get a personal development plan, an AI coach, and honest labor market analytics.
landing.noCard: No card required. Basic access is free forever.
landing.segmentGraduatesText: Find your direction early and land in your desired field with a clear plan.
landing.segmentExperiencedText: Switch to a new profession without chaos: assess your current job and build a transition route.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Seven key MVP features that guide you from choice to results.
landing.howSubtitle: Four steps to a clear trajectory.
landing.ctaText: Registration takes a minute. Career orientation and development roadmap are already in the free plan.

coach.title: AI coach in chat
coach.text: Personal dialogue: helps choose a direction, set goals, and stay motivated.

orientation.title: Career orientation
orientation.text: An interests and aptitudes test suggests up to 10 matching professions with fit scores.

roadmap.title: Development roadmap
roadmap.text: A step-by-step track path: skills by grade, materials, and checkpoints.

tests.title: Assessment tests
tests.text: Track progress by stage. Weak topics are highlighted so you know what to improve.

market.title: Market analytics
market.text: Salaries by grade, demand, and top companies — for an informed choice.

progress.title: Progress and motivation
progress.text: Skill tracker, login streaks, and coach support keep you focused on your goal.

1.title: Take career orientation
1.text: Answer a few questions — get matching professions.

2.title: Choose a track
2.text: Study market analytics and set your development goal.

3.title: Follow the roadmap
3.text: Learn skills, take tests, track progress.

4.title: Grow with the coach
4.text: The AI coach helps at every step and keeps you motivated.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue your development.
auth.registerSubtitle: Basic access is free. No credit card required.
auth.name: Name
auth.passwordHint: More than 8 characters, letters, digits, and a special symbol.

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.description: We sent a code to {email}. Enter it to access the platform.
verify.demoCode: Demo mode: no email is sent. Your code: {code}

pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Paid plans remove limits and unlock all coach and test features.
pricing.demoNote: Demo mode: payment is mocked, no real charges occur.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Describe your issue or question — we'll reply to your email within 24 hours.
support.successText: We'll reply to your email within 24 hours.

professions.catalogSubtitle: Explore market requirements, salaries by grade, and required skills. Choose a track to build your personal development roadmap.
professions.trackError: Failed to create track. Please try again.

dashboard.trackActive: Your track: {track}. Keep up the great work!
dashboard.startOrientation: Start with career orientation to find your direction.
dashboard.talkToCoachDesc: Discuss goals, skills, and your next development step.
dashboard.openRoadmapDesc: Track progress and go to materials.
dashboard.chooseTrackDesc: Choose a profession and build a roadmap.

coach.title: AI Coach
coach.emptyText: I'm Jobish AI, your career coach. Ask about choosing a profession, skills, or development goals.
coach.demoNote: Demo coach engine. Connect OPENROUTER_API_KEY for real model responses.
coach.roadmapUpdated: Roadmap updated: {count} skill(s) marked as done → open roadmap

suggestions.0: Help me choose an IT direction
suggestions.1: What skills do I need for my track?
suggestions.2: Help me define my career goals

orientationPage.title: Career orientation test
orientationPage.subtitle: Answer {count} questions about your interests — we'll suggest matching professions with fit scores.
orientationPage.resultsSubtitle: Sorted by fit score. Choose a track and start your development.
orientationPage.noStrongMatch: No strong matches found — results are advisory. You can retake the test or discuss your choice with the AI coach.
orientationPage.goalsAutoGenerated: Career goals generated automatically. Open the dashboard to review them.
orientationPage.alreadyDone: You've already taken this test. You can retake it to refresh recommendations.
orientationPage.skipHelp: Demo mode: answers will be filled randomly — to quickly see what results look like without all {total} questions.

q1.text: What interests you most at work?

q2.text: What task would you enjoy most on a weekend?
options: Build a side project or automate a routine
Dig into a large dataset and draw conclusions
Help a friend plan a launch idea

q3.text: How do you prefer to solve problems?

options: 'This looks great and is easy to use'

q5.text: What fits you better when working in a team?
options: Owning product priorities and the roadmap

q6.text: What result gives you the most satisfaction?
options: A working system you built yourself
A dashboard the whole team watches
A product that's a pleasure to use
A team that reached its goal together

q7.text: Which project would you pick at a hackathon?
options: Write a backend service from scratch
Build an ML model on competition data
Assemble a team and assign roles

q8.text: What do you enjoy learning in your spare time?
options: A new programming language or framework

q9.text: What role do you usually take in group projects?
options: I write the main technical part
I calculate metrics and test hypotheses
I'm responsible for look and presentation

q10.text: What annoys you most at work?

q11.text: What do you most enjoy reading professional articles about?
options: Analytics case studies and A/B tests
Seeing a pattern in a sea of numbers
Making complex things beautiful and clear

q13.text: What are you most often praised for?

q14.text: Which course would you take first?

q15.text: What does 'work well done' mean to you?
options: A solution that's a pleasure to use

q16.text: Where do you feel most comfortable?
options: Alone with a hard problem and code
In meetings and conversations with people

q17.text: Which task would you take on more willingly?
options: Find the cause of a metric drop

q18.text: What interests you most in a product?
options: What value it delivers to the user

q19.text: Which achievement would make you happiest?
options: Made the system twice as fast
Found an insight that changed strategy
Launched a product together with the team

q20.text: Which toolset would you most like to master?

q21.text: What would you notice first in an app?
options: How well it solves my problem

q22.text: What do you rely on when making a decision?

q23.text: Which meeting doesn't feel like a burden?

q24.text: What would you most want to automate first?

q25.text: Which feedback is more valuable to you?

q26.text: What fits you better in learning?
options: Understanding how everything works under the hood
Testing a hypothesis with an experiment
Taking a great example and improving it
Discussing and applying with others in practice

q27.text: Who would you like to be in 5 years?

q28.text: What motivates you most in a task?
options: The chance to find the truth in data

q29.text: What blog or channel would you run?

q30.text: What matters most to you in the outcome?

orientationPage.methodology: Based on John Holland's RIASEC model of professional interests and the public O*NET Interest Profiler methodology (U.S. Department of Labor).

roadmap.emptyText: Choose a profession track — we'll automatically build a personal skills roadmap by grade.
roadmap.refreshTitle: Refresh courses (including soft skills) and stage descriptions from the catalog
roadmap.legendIntro: Click the icon to the left of a skill to change its status:
roadmap.materialNotSet: No material set · ~{hours} h to master

tests.title: Assessment tests
tests.subtitle: Test your knowledge. Passing score is 70%. On failure, the test is frozen for 24 hours.
tests.personalHint: Personal tests are generated for your track; after a failed attempt difficulty is reduced (FT-7.7/7.8).
tests.frozenBody: You didn't reach the passing score. Retake will be available {date}. Review weak topics or unfreeze the test.
tests.frozenDemoNote: Demo mode: payment and ads are mocked — the attempt will be added immediately.

profile.title: Profile
profile.deleteConfirm: Delete account and all personal data permanently?

goals.title: Career goals
goals.selectTrackWarning: Choose a development track to generate goals based on it.
goals.empty: No goals yet. Click «Generate» to get long-term goals based on your track and experience.
